title: centranthera indica
intro: Centranthera indica, also known as the Indian valerian, is a plant species that belongs to the family Valerianaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a sedative and a muscle relaxant, due to its high concentration of valerenic acid and valeranone. The health benefits of Centranthera indica include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and relieving muscle spasms and menstrual cramps. Centranthera indica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
